target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible structural collapse on one side of the building; significant facade and structural damage concentrated in a vertical section; damage appears to affect multiple floors; consistent with 45 to 75 percent of target element area damaged.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The target building appears structurally intact with no visible damage to its facade, windows, or structural elements; no debris, cracks, or collapsed sections are evident.

summary: One building shows SEVERE DAMAGE with probable 45-75% area affected, while another building shows NO DAMAGE. The scene depicts a tall residential building with significant structural damage on one side, contrasting with an adjacent intact building. The likely functional impact is severe disruption to the damaged building’s occupancy and structural integrity, while the undamaged building remains functional.
